creator: linimon@lonesome.com
text:
----- Forwarded message from Sutra Zhou <zhoushuqun@gmail.com> -----

From: Sutra Zhou <zhoushuqun@gmail.com>
To: linimon@freebsd.org
Cc: freebsd-ports-bugs@freebsd.org, freebsd-eclipse@freebsd.org
Subject: Re: ports/149704: java/eclipse: plugins doesn't work in
	eclipse-3.5.2_1

I encountered this issue too, so when I upgrade the eclipse-webtools
port, I installed them into the dropins
directory(/usr/local/lib/eclipse/dropins), see PR 148992.

On Mon, Aug 16, 2010 at 11:50 PM,  <linimon@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Old Synopsis: plugins doesn't work in eclipse-3.5.2_1
> New Synopsis: java/eclipse: plugins doesn't work in eclipse-3.5.2_1
>
> Responsible-Changed-From-To: freebsd-ports-bugs->freebsd-eclipse
> Responsible-Changed-By: linimon
> Responsible-Changed-When: Mon Aug 16 15:49:16 UTC 2010
> Responsible-Changed-Why:
> Fix synopsis and assign.
>
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=149704

> freebsd-eclipse@freebsd.org mailing list
